greenfield.description: Build the initial URL-shortening service from scratch.

input.requirement: Build a URL shortener service with create/resolve/delete APIs, custom aliases, expiration, and click analytics

brownfield.description: Enhance the existing service with expiring links; shows impact analysis, regression tests, sandboxed patching, rollback capability.

input.requirement: Add link expiration to the existing URL shortener: expired links must return 410, create API accepts expires_at, existing redirect behaviour must not regress

ambiguous.description: Vague requirement: agent must surface ambiguity, propose measurable interpretations, record assumptions, and pause for human sign-off before decomposition.

input.requirement: make shortened links secure and reliable
